elements.name: Rhine Tribunal
elements.summary: Germany and the great forests of central Europe; tradition-bound, gauntlet-strict.
elements.as_thread: A Rhine custom or a senior magus' ruling constrains the covenant.

elements.name: Normandy Tribunal
elements.summary: Northern France; crowded, competitive, tournament-style Tribunal politics.
elements.wants: Win covenant rights through aggressive Tribunal play.

elements.name: Provençal Tribunal
elements.summary: Southern France and the Pyrenees; courtly love, Cathar shadows.
elements.wants: Navigate heresy-haunted courts and old grudges.
elements.as_thread: A Cathar crisis or courtly intrigue reaches the covenant.

elements.name: Stonehenge Tribunal
elements.summary: England and Wales; conquest-haunted, ancient sites.
elements.wants: Contest old Norman wounds and ancient power.
elements.as_thread: An ancient site or conquest grievance surfaces.

elements.name: Loch Leglean Tribunal
elements.summary: Scotland; wild highlands and hedge traditions.
elements.wants: Hold the wild frontier and tolerate hedge magic.
elements.as_thread: A highland hedge tradition or wild power intrudes.

elements.name: Hibernian Tribunal
elements.summary: Ireland; deep faerie presence and old covenants.
elements.wants: Honour ancient pacts and old Hermetic claims.
elements.as_thread: An Irish faerie pact or old covenant claim is invoked.

elements.name: Greater Alps Tribunal
elements.summary: The Alpine arc; isolated, vis-rich, treacherous passes.
elements.wants: Guard isolated vis sources and mountain secrets.
elements.as_thread: An Alpine vis source or hidden covenant is contested.

elements.name: Iberian Tribunal
elements.summary: Spain and Portugal; the Christian–Muslim frontier and the Reconquista.
elements.wants: Survive the frontier and trade across faiths.
elements.as_thread: The Reconquista frontier draws the covenant into war or trade.

elements.name: Roman Tribunal
elements.summary: The Italian peninsula; the Pope's shadow and the ruins of antiquity.
elements.wants: Work beneath the Pope's reach amid ancient ruins.
elements.as_thread: A papal shadow or an antique ruin entangles the covenant.

elements.name: Theban Tribunal
elements.summary: Greece and the Aegean; Byzantine learning, Mystery cults, initiation.
elements.as_thread: A Theban Mystery or Byzantine matter calls.

elements.name: Transylvanian Tribunal
elements.summary: Eastern Europe and the Carpathians; House Tremere's stronghold.
elements.wants: Maintain Tremere order across the east.
elements.as_thread: Tremere hierarchy in the east makes a demand.

elements.name: Novgorod Tribunal
elements.summary: The Rus' lands and the northeast; frozen frontier and pagan survivals.
elements.wants: Hold the frozen frontier amid pagan power.
elements.as_thread: A Rus' pagan survival or frontier peril arises.

elements.name: Levant Tribunal
elements.summary: The Crusader states and the Holy Land; Outremer, Crusade, and strong Dominion.
elements.wants: Survive Crusade politics and crushing Dominion auras.
elements.as_thread: Crusade or a strong Dominion aura pressures the covenant.
